texto: A man who chooses between drinking a glass of milk and a glass of a solution of potassium cyanide does not choose between two beverages
autor: he chooses between life and death. A society that chooses between capitalism and socialism does not choose between two social systems
explicacao: Citação de he chooses between life and death. A society that chooses between capitalism and socialism does not choose between two social systems sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “A man who chooses between drinking a glass of milk and a glass of a solution of potassium cyanide…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
